sources_failed.reason: wget --spider --recursive --level=4 against https://docs.copilotkit.ai/ returned only 29 URLs, all of which were _next/static/* assets, fonts, and robots.txt — no HTML page links. The docs site is a Next.js client-rendered SPA whose nav menu is hydrated in JavaScript, so wget has no anchor hrefs to follow. The sitemap is the canonical source of doc URLs and supersedes the wget crawl. Source documented as failed but not blocking.
